actions.name: CreateCentralizationRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new organization centralization rule with the specified name for the organization

actions.name: CreateS3TableIntegration
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new s3 table integration with the specified configuration

actions.name: CreateTelemetryPipeline
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new telemetry pipeline with the specified name and configuration

actions.name: CreateTelemetryRule
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new telemetry rule with the specified name for the account

actions.name: CreateTelemetryRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new organization telemetry rule with the specified name for the organization

actions.name: DeleteCentralizationRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to delete an organization centralization rule with the specified name for the organization

actions.name: DeleteS3TableIntegration
actions.description: Grants permission to delete the s3 table integration with the specified arn

actions.name: DeleteTelemetryPipeline
actions.description: Grants permission to delete the telemetry pipeline with the specified arn

actions.name: DeleteTelemetryRule
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a telemetry rule with the specified name for the account

actions.name: DeleteTelemetryRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to delete an organization telemetry rule with the specified name for the organization

actions.name: GetCentralizationRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the specified organization centralization rule for the organization

actions.name: GetS3TableIntegration
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the specified s3 table integration for the account

actions.name: GetTelemetryEnrichmentStatus
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the status of the Resource tags for telemetry feature for the account

actions.name: GetTelemetryEvaluationStatus
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the Telemetry Config feature status for the account

actions.name: GetTelemetryEvaluationStatusForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the Telemetry Config feature status for the organization

actions.name: GetTelemetryPipeline
actions.description: Grants permission to Get the telemetry pipeline with the specified name or arn

actions.name: GetTelemetryRule
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the specified telemetry rule for the account

actions.name: GetTelemetryRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the specified organization telemetry rule for the organization

actions.name: ListCentralizationRulesForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to list the centralization rules for the organization

actions.name: ListResourceTelemetry
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve telemetry configurations for resources associated with the account

actions.name: ListResourceTelemetryForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve telemetry configurations for resources associated with accounts in the organization

actions.name: ListS3TableIntegrations
actions.description: Grants permission to list s3 table integrations for the account

actions.name: ListTagsForResource
actions.description: Grants permission to list the tags for the specified resource

actions.name: ListTelemetryPipelines
actions.description: Grants permission to List telemetry pipelines for the account

actions.name: ListTelemetryRules
actions.description: Grants permission to list the telemetry rules for the account

actions.name: ListTelemetryRulesForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to list the telemetry rules for the organization

actions.name: StartTelemetryEnrichment
actions.description: Grants permission to enable the Resource tags for telemetry feature for the account

actions.name: StartTelemetryEvaluation
actions.description: Grants permission to start the Telemetry Config feature for the account

actions.name: StartTelemetryEvaluationForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to start the Telemetry Config feature for the organization

actions.name: StopTelemetryEnrichment
actions.description: Grants permission to disable the Resource tags for telemetry feature for the account

actions.name: StopTelemetryEvaluation
actions.description: Grants permission to stop the Telemetry Config feature for the account

actions.name: StopTelemetryEvaluationForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to stop the Telemetry Config feature for the organization

actions.name: TagResource
actions.description: Grants permission to add or update the specified tags for the specified resource

actions.name: TestTelemetryPipeline
actions.description: Grants permission to Test a telemetry pipeline configuration with sample data

actions.name: UntagResource
actions.description: Grants permission to remove the specified tags from the specified resource

actions.name: UpdateCentralizationRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to update the specified centralization rule for the organization

actions.name: UpdateTelemetryPipeline
actions.description: Grants permission to Update the telemetry pipeline with the specified arn

actions.name: UpdateTelemetryRule
actions.description: Grants permission to update the specified telemetry rule for the account

actions.name: UpdateTelemetryRuleForOrganization
actions.description: Grants permission to update the specified telemetry rule for the organization

actions.name: ValidateTelemetryPipelineConfiguration
actions.description: Grants permission to Validate a telemetry pipeline configuration
